notice: Important Notice (For States of Assam, Nagaland, Tripura, Arunachal Pradesh, Meghalaya,Mizoram,Sikkim and Manipur) Important: Registration of further applications on the UNNATI Portal has presently been stopped on account of applications exceeding the available funding for the Scheme against allocated to the States. The applications received are being reviewed and in the event of rejection of existing applications or availability of funds, the registration process may be resumed. Further directions in this regard shall be issued by the competent authority separately.
